channel.title: ETL on Arjun Sajeevan
channel.description: Recent content in ETL on Arjun Sajeevan

item.title: Fastest Teradata Migration: TPT
item.description: How to move 2 Billion+ records using Teradata Parallel Transporter (TPT) for maximum throughput.

item.title: SQL Server Performance: Accelerating Inserts with TABLOCK
item.description: How to use TABLOCK to enable minimal logging and speed up bulk data loads in SQL Server.
